source_detail.title: peblo_pdf_grade1_math_numbers.pdf
source_detail.summary: Peblo Sample Content – Grade 1 Mathematics Topic: Numbers, Counting and Shapes 1. (MCQ) How many sides does a triangle have? A. 2 B. 3 C. 4 D. 5 Answer: 3 2. (MCQ) Which number comes after 19? A. 18 B. 20 C. 21 D. 17 Answer: 20 3. (Fill) Fill in the blank: 7 + 2 = ____. Answer: 9 4. (True/False) A square has four equal sides. Answer: True 5. (MCQ) Which shape is round? A. Square B. Triangle C. Cir

chunks.content: Peblo Sample Content – Grade 1 Mathematics Topic: Numbers, Counting and Shapes 1. (MCQ) How many sides does a triangle have? A. 2 B. 3 C. 4 D. 5 Answer: 3 2. (MCQ) Which number comes after 19? A. 18 B. 20 C. 21 D. 17 Answer: 20 3. (Fill) Fill in the blank: 7 + 2 = ____. Answer: 9 4. (True/False) A square has four equal sides. Answer: True 5. (MCQ) Which shape is round? A. Square B. Triangle C. Circle D. Rectangle Answer: Circle 6. (Fill) Fill in the blank: 10 - 4 = ____. Answer: 6 7. (True/False) The number 15 is greater than 12. Answer: True 8. (MCQ) Which number is the smallest? A. 9 B. 4 C. 7 D. 6 Answer: 4 9. (Fill) Fill in the blank: 5 + 5 = ____. Answer: 10 10. (MCQ) How many corners does a rectangle have? A. 2 B. 3 C. 4 D. 5 Answer: 4

source_detail.title: peblo_pdf_grade3_science_plants_animals.pdf
source_detail.summary: Peblo Sample Content – Grade 3 Science Topic: Plants and Animals 1. (MCQ) Which part of a plant makes food? A. Root B. Leaf C. Stem D. Flower Answer: Leaf 2. (True/False) Plants need sunlight to grow. Answer: True 3. (Fill) Fill in the blank: Animals that eat only plants are called ____. Answer: Herbivores 4. (MCQ) Which animal is a carnivore? A. Cow B. Lion C. Goat D. Deer Answer: Lion 5. (Fill)

chunks.content: Peblo Sample Content – Grade 3 Science Topic: Plants and Animals 1. (MCQ) Which part of a plant makes food? A. Root B. Leaf C. Stem D. Flower Answer: Leaf 2. (True/False) Plants need sunlight to grow. Answer: True 3. (Fill) Fill in the blank: Animals that eat only plants are called ____. Answer: Herbivores 4. (MCQ) Which animal is a carnivore? A. Cow B. Lion C. Goat D. Deer Answer: Lion 5. (Fill) Fill in the blank: The part of the plant that absorbs water from soil is the ____. Answer: Root 6. (True/False) Birds are animals that can lay eggs. Answer: True 7. (MCQ) Which of these is not a plant part? A. Leaf B. Root C. Stem D. Wing Answer: Wing 8. (Fill) Fill in the blank: Plants release ____ gas during photosynthesis. Answer: Oxygen 9. (True/False) All animals can make their own food. Answer: False 10. (MCQ) Which animal lives in water? A. Tiger B. Fish C. Elephant D. Dog Answer: Fish

Child Answer: Children 2. (True/False) A noun is the name of a person, place, animal, or thing. Answer: True 3. (Fill) Fill in the blank: She ____ to school every day. Answer: goes 4. (MCQ) Which word is an adjective? A. Quick B. Run C. Jump D. Pla

chunks.content: Peblo Sample Content – Grade 4 English Topic: Grammar and Vocabulary 1. (MCQ) Choose the correct plural of 'child'. A. Childs B. Children C. Childes D. Child Answer: Children 2. (True/False) A noun is the name of a person, place, animal, or thing. Answer: True 3. (Fill) Fill in the blank: She ____ to school every day. Answer: goes 4. (MCQ) Which word is an adjective? A. Quick B. Run C. Jump D. Play Answer: Quick 5. (Fill) Fill in the blank: The opposite of 'hot' is ____. Answer: cold 6. (True/False) Verbs describe actions. Answer: True 7. (MCQ) Which sentence is correct? A. She go to school B. She goes to school C. She going school D. She gone school Answer: She goes to school 8. (Fill) Fill in the blank: Birds can ____ in the sky. Answer: fly 9. (MCQ) Which word is a synonym of 'happy'? A. Sad B. Joyful C. Angry D. Tired Answer: Joyful 10. (True/False) An adjective describes a noun.
a synonym of 'happy'? A. Sad B. Joyful C. Angry D. Tired Answer: Joyful 10. (True/False) An adjective describes a noun. Answer: True
